description: The dataset '/home/ga/Documents/JASP/BigFivePersonalityTraits.csv' is loaded in JASP. This dataset contains Likert-scale scores for the Big Five personality traits. Your goal is to compare the scores of 'Neuroticism', 'Extraversion', and 'Openness' within the same subjects using a Friedman non-parametric test. Include Kendall's W as the effect size and save the analysis results to '/home/ga/Documents/JASP/Friedman_Analysis.jasp'.
